questions.question: A is B's sister. B is C's brother. C is D's son. How is A related to D?
questions.explanation: C is D's son → B is also D's child → A is D's daughter (since A is sister to B).

questions.question: Pointing to a photograph, a man says 'She is my mother's mother's daughter.' How is the person in photo related to the man?
questions.explanation: Mother's mother's daughter = grandmother's daughter = man's mother's sister = aunt.

questions.question: P is Q's father. R is S's son. Q is married to R. How is P related to S?
questions.explanation: P is Q's father. Q married R (who is S's son). So P is R's father-in-law, and grandfather to... Actually P is Q's father; Q married R; S is R's father. P is S's son's father-in-law.

questions.question: If A + B means A is the mother of B, A - B means A is the brother of B, A × B means A is the father of B, A ÷ B means A is the sister of B. What does P + Q - R mean?
options: P is Q's mother; Q is R's brother
questions.correctAnswer: P is Q's mother; Q is R's brother
questions.explanation: P+Q: P is mother of Q. Q-R: Q is brother of R. So P is mother of Q who is brother of R.

questions.question: Rohan is Meena's father. Meena is Suresh's wife. Suresh is Anuj's father. What is Rohan's relationship to Anuj?
questions.explanation: Rohan → Meena → Suresh → Anuj. Rohan is grandfather of Anuj.

questions.question: Introducing a girl, a man said 'Her mother is the only daughter of my mother.' How is the girl related to the man?
questions.explanation: Only daughter of man's mother = man's sister. So girl's mother is man's sister → girl is man's niece.

questions.question: A and B are brothers. C and D are sisters. A's son is D's brother. How is B related to C?
questions.explanation: A's son is D's brother → A is father of D and C. A and B are brothers → B is uncle to C and D.
